---
title: "About This Website"
---

### Ivanna de Anda, MPH

I am a recent graduate from Emory University, where I received my Masters Degree in Public Health, focusing on Environmental Epidemiology. During my time there, I also completed certificates in Data Science and Climate & Health.

Prior to coming to Emory, I received my BA in Public Health-Global Health from the University of Washington in Seattle.


I am currently based in Portland, OR


### Interests:

* Climate resilience
* Public health informed urban planning
* Environmental data analysis
* Built environment research
